name: lyria-3-song-generator
description: Generate songs with Google's Lyria 3 from a local script using a strict timestamped section-line lyric format.

interface.shortDescription: Generate songs with Lyria 3 from formatted lyric sections
interface.longDescription: Use the bundled local script to generate full songs or short music clips with Google's Lyria 3 from strict timestamped section lines and save the audio, lyrics or structure text, and metadata into the workspace.
defaultPrompt: [00:00 - 00:12] [Intro]: Intensity: [2/10]. Lyrics: "None" [Warm guitar and soft synth pads.]
[00:12 - 00:30] [Verse]: Intensity: [4/10]. Lyrics: "Headlights bloom across the lane" [Close vocal and restrained groove.]
[00:30 - 00:48] [Chorus]: Intensity: [8/10]. Lyrics: "City lights after rain" [Wide synths and a cinematic lift.]
